message:
feat: Complete Anthropic API compatibility for Claude Code

Implement 100% drop-in replacement for Anthropic Messages API:

Phase 1 - Content Array Parsing:
- Parse content as both string and array of content blocks
- Handle system prompt as string or array
- Manual JSON parsing to support union types

Phase 2 - Streaming SSE:
- Full SSE event sequence (message_start, content_block_start,
  content_block_delta, content_block_stop, message_delta, message_stop)
- Real-time token streaming as generation progresses
- Track bytes_sent to avoid duplicate streaming

Phase 3 - Stop Sequences:
- Parse stop_sequences array from request
- Check for stop sequences during generation
- Truncate output and set correct stop_reason
- Proper cleanup of owned stop_sequences memory

This enables Claude Code to work with Zell via:
  export ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL="http://localhost:11434"
  export ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN="dummy"
  claude
